product.name: Brushed Nickel Vanity Light 31.5", 24W LED Dimmable Bathroom Light Bar with Adjustable Angle & 5CCT – Modern Long Wall Fixture for Bathroom, Powder Room, Bedroom, Apartment, Hotel
features: Elegant Brushed Nickel Finish – The Keliden brushed nick vanity light boasts a clean, modern 31.5” linear design, paired with a soft metallic tone that enhances both traditional and contemporary interiors
5CCT Adjustable Color Temperatures – This brushed nick vanity light features 5 selectable color temperatures (2500K–5300K), ideal for daily grooming or ambient bathroom lighting
Adjustable Lighting Direction – With a 180° rotatable light bar, this brushed nick vanity light gives you complete flexibility to direct light upward or downward based on your layout and preference

24W Integrated LED + ETL Dimmable Driver – Built-in high-efficiency 24W LED chip with an ETL-certified TRIAC dimmable driver ensures long lifespan and smooth brightness control in this brushed nick vanity light

Durable Materials & Moisture Resistance – Constructed from metal with brushed nickel spray finish and frosted acrylic diffuser, this brushed nick vanity light is designed for use in damp environments like bathrooms and powder rooms
Fits Multiple Spaces & Mirror Sizes – This 31.5-inch brushed nick vanity light is perfect for wide vanity mirrors in master bathrooms, bedrooms, guest bathrooms, apartments, or hospitality spaces
Fast Hardwired Installation – All mounting hardware and detailed instructions are included, making this brushed nick vanity light easy to install for both homeowners and professional electricians
